task_completion.description: Create a local Maven repository named 'ms-releases' with the correct description
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Artifactory Administration -> Repositories -> Local screen showing a repository named 'ms-releases' with the Package Type 'Maven' and the description 'Microservice release artifacts - Meridian Payments'.

task_completion.description: Create a remote Maven repository named 'maven-central-proxy' proxying Maven Central
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Repositories -> Remote screen showing a repository named 'maven-central-proxy' with the Package Type 'Maven' and the URL set to 'https://repo1.maven.org/maven2'.

task_completion.description: Create a virtual Maven repository named 'ms-build-virtual'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Repositories -> Virtual screen showing a repository named 'ms-build-virtual' with the Package Type 'Maven'.

task_completion.description: Configure 'ms-build-virtual' to aggregate the local and remote repos in the correct order
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the configuration screen of 'ms-build-virtual' showing the 'Selected Repositories' list. Both 'ms-releases' and 'maven-central-proxy' must be in the selected list, and 'ms-releases' must appear above/before 'maven-central-proxy'.
Look for the Identity and Access -> Groups screen showing a newly created group named 'build-engineers'.
Look for the Identity and Access -> Permissions screen showing a newly created permission named 'build-access'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Artifactory web interface rather than terminal API commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the JFrog Artifactory web GUI being navigated, rather than a terminal window executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Artifactory application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar should be visible and show 'localhost:8082' (or the appropriate local IP) with the Artifactory UI loaded.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs (repository names, descriptions, groups, permissions) must be entered into the actual Artifactory form fields, not a notepad or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring JFrog Artifactory at http://localhost:8082. Verify the creation of: 1) A local Maven repo named 'ms-releases' with description 'Microservice release artifacts - Meridian Payments'. 2) A remote Maven repo named 'maven-central-proxy' proxying 'https://repo1.maven.org/maven2'. 3) A virtual Maven repo named 'ms-build-virtual' that includes both, with 'ms-releases' ordered before 'maven-central-proxy'. 4) A group named 'build-engineers'. 5) A permission named 'build-access'.
